description: E2E test case designs for opencode-llm crate - Multi-provider LLM abstraction

test_cases.title: Provider chat completion flow
test_cases.description: Test basic chat completion through Provider trait
steps: Create OpenAI provider with test API key
Send chat request with system and user messages
expected_outcomes: Request succeeds with valid API key

test_cases.title: Provider retry logic on transient failures
steps: Verify request retried up to max_retries

test_cases.title: Provider registry and model listing
steps: Call get_models() - verify all models listed

test_cases.title: OAuth authentication flow
test_cases.description: Test OAuth token acquisition and refresh
steps: Initiate OAuth flow for Google/GitHub provider

test_cases.title: Provider model catalog fetching
steps: Cache catalog and verify cache hit

test_cases.title: Message transform pipeline
steps: Create pipeline with system prompt prepend

test_cases.title: CRITICAL: Invalid API key returns clear error
test_cases.description: Invalid credentials must produce actionable error
test_cases.risk_addressed: Silent failures or confusing errors when API key invalid
test_cases.preconditions: Provider configured with known-bad API key
steps: Verify error distinguishes auth failure from network failure
expected_outcomes: Error does not expose sensitive info
Error type is distinct from network/timeout errors
post_checks: Can update to valid key without restart
Error logged with request ID for debugging

test_cases.title: Provider timeout handling
test_cases.description: Requests must timeout and return error, not hang
test_cases.risk_addressed: Agent hangs indefinitely on slow provider
steps: Execute request that takes 30s to respond
post_checks: Provider still usable for subsequent requests

test_cases.title: Malformed response handling
test_cases.description: Provider must handle malformed API responses gracefully
test_cases.risk_addressed: Crash or panic on malformed JSON from provider
steps: Configure mock to return each malformed response

test_cases.title: Rate limit Retry-After header parsing
test_cases.description: Retry backoff must respect Retry-After header from provider
test_cases.risk_addressed: Retries happen too fast, immediately hitting rate limit again
steps: Verify retry happens after ~60 seconds, not immediately
expected_outcomes: Retry delay is proportional to header value

test_cases.title: Provider switch mid-conversation
test_cases.description: Switch provider mid-session must preserve context
steps: Switch provider from OpenAI to Anthropic mid-session
Verify context (previous messages) sent to new provider
expected_outcomes: All previous messages included in new request
Provider switch does not lose conversation history

test_cases.title: Monthly budget reset
test_cases.description: Budget must reset at correct time boundary
test_cases.risk_addressed: Budget not resetting, blocking requests indefinitely
steps: Simulate month boundary (advance clock or mock time)

test_cases.title: Budget exceeded during streaming response
test_cases.description: Budget check timing during chunked responses
test_cases.risk_addressed: Budget checked only at start, allowing overage during streaming

test_cases.title: Concurrent requests to same provider
test_cases.description: Multiple simultaneous requests to same provider handled correctly
test_cases.risk_addressed: Race conditions in request tracking, connection pool exhaustion
steps: Verify no connection pool exhaustion panic
expected_outcomes: Rate limits applied correctly across requests

test_cases.title: Request cancellation releases resources
test_cases.description: Cancelled request must release connection and not block others
test_cases.risk_addressed: Cancelled requests holding connection, starving other requests
steps: Verify new requests proceed (not blocked by cancelled)
expected_outcomes: No resource leak from cancelled request

test_cases.title: Transform pipeline with multiple transforms
steps: Create pipeline: [prepend system, append memory, truncate history]
Verify final message count within limit

test_cases.title: Transform pipeline error propagation
test_cases.description: Transform failure must error the request, not pass bad data
test_cases.risk_addressed: Transform failure silently passes through with corrupt data
steps: Create pipeline where one transform errors
Verify original request not sent to provider
expected_outcomes: No request made to provider with bad data

critical_invariants: Invalid API key returns clear error (not silent)
Timeout releases resources, no zombie connections
high_risk_scenarios: provider_err_001: Invalid API key confusing error
